CHANGE_PASSWORD_CTL - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
 
CHANGE_PASSWORD_VIEW - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
 
changePassword(Long, String, String) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
Changes the password of an existing user after validating the old password.
ChangePasswordCtl - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.controller
ChangePasswordCtl is a Controller class that handles the Change Password functionality for logged-in users.

checkByCourseName(Long, Date) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Checks and returns a Timetable record from the ST_TIMETABLE table by matching the given course ID and exam date.
checkByCourseName(Long, Date) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.FacultyModel
Checks whether a timetable entry exists for the given course and exam date.
checkByExamTime(Long, Long, String, Date, String, String) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Checks and returns a Timetable record from the ST_TIMETABLE table by matching the given course ID, subject ID, semester, exam date, exam time, and description.
checkByExamTime(Long, Long, String, Date, String, String) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.FacultyModel
Checks whether a timetable entry exists matching all provided criteria including course, subject, semester, exam date, exam time, and description.
checkBySemester(Long, Long, String, Date) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Checks and returns a Timetable record from the ST_TIMETABLE table by matching the given course ID, subject ID, semester, and exam date.
checkBySemester(Long, Long, String, Date) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.FacultyModel
Checks whether a timetable entry exists for the given course, subject, semester, and exam date.
checkBySubjectName(Long, Long, Date) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Checks and returns a Timetable record from the ST_TIMETABLE table by matching the given course ID, subject ID, and exam date.
checkBySubjectName(Long, Long, Date) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.FacultyModel
Checks whether a timetable entry exists for the given course, subject, and exam date.
